# Thrive Dental — Bayside, Queens NY

> Thrive Dental is a full-service dental practice at 41-02 Bell Blvd, Bayside, NY 11361, serving patients from Bayside and all of Northeast Queens. Services include general dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, Invisalign® (Gold Plus Provider), dental implants, emergency dentistry, porcelain veneers, and teeth whitening. Phone: (718) 225-6677.

## Core Service Pages

- [General Dentistry](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/general-dentistry): Cleanings, exams, fillings, preventive care for all ages in Bayside, Queens.
- [Dental Implants](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/dental-implants): Permanent tooth replacement with 3D cone beam imaging and in-house placement. $3,500–$6,000 per implant including post, abutment, and crown.
- [Invisalign®](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/invisalign): Clear aligner treatment for teens and adults. Thrive Dental is an Invisalign Gold Plus Provider with iTero digital scanning.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/cosmetic-dentistry): Smile makeovers including veneers, bonding, and whitening.
- [Porcelain Veneers](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/porcelain-veneers): Custom ceramic veneers for chips, gaps, discoloration, and shape corrections.
- [Teeth Whitening](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/teeth-whitening): Philips Zoom! in-office whitening (up to 8 shades brighter) and custom take-home trays.
- [Emergency Dentistry](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/emergency-dentistry): Same-day appointments for toothaches, broken teeth, abscesses, and knocked-out teeth.
- [Root Canal Therapy](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/root-canal-therapy): Comfortable root canal treatment to save infected teeth.
- [Dental Crowns](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/dental-crowns): Custom porcelain and zirconia crowns with digital impressions.
- [Full-Mouth Reconstruction](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/services/full-mouth-reconstruction): Comprehensive restorative treatment for patients with multiple missing, damaged, or decayed teeth.

## Local Pages (Northeast Queens Neighborhoods)

- [Dentist in Bayside, Queens](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-bayside-ny): Main location page for Bayside, NY 11361.
- [Dentist near Flushing, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-flushing-ny): Serving Flushing patients, ~15 min via Northern Blvd.
- [Dentist near Douglaston, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-douglaston-ny): Serving Douglaston, just 5 min away.
- [Dentist near Little Neck, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-little-neck-ny): Serving Little Neck and Great Neck area.
- [Dentist near Whitestone, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-whitestone-ny): Serving Whitestone, ~10 min via Whitestone Expressway.
- [Dentist near Fresh Meadows, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-fresh-meadows-ny): Serving Fresh Meadows, ~15 min via Union Tpke.
- [Dentist near Oakland Gardens, NY](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/dentist-oakland-gardens-ny): Serving Oakland Gardens, ~12 min via Francis Lewis Blvd.

## Blog — Patient Education

- [How Much Do Dental Implants Cost in Queens, NY?](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/dental-implants-cost-queens-ny): Transparent cost breakdown for implants in Queens ($3,500–$6,000 range), by Dr. Yelena Mikhaylova, DDS.
- [Invisalign vs. Braces: Which Is Right for You?](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/invisalign-vs-braces-bayside): Side-by-side comparison of clear aligners vs traditional braces.
- [Dental Emergency? Here's Exactly What to Do.](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/dental-emergency-what-to-do): Step-by-step guidance for common dental emergencies.
- [How Often Should You Really Get a Dental Cleaning?](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/how-often-dental-cleaning): Evidence-based guidance on cleaning frequency beyond the "every 6 months" rule.
- [The Complete Guide to Porcelain Veneers](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/porcelain-veneers-guide): Candidacy, process, lifespan, and what makes a great veneer result.
- [Signs of Gum Disease Most People Miss](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/blog/gum-disease-signs-treatment): Early warning signs and treatment options for periodontal disease.

## Doctors

- [Dr. Yelena Mikhaylova, DDS](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/doctors/yelena-mikhaylova): Lead dentist and Invisalign Gold Plus Provider.
- [Dr. Alla Hart, DMD](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/doctors/alla-hart): General and cosmetic dentistry.
- [Dr. Abanob Saleh, DDS](https://www.thrivedentalny.com/doctors/abanob-saleh): Restorative and implant dentistry.

## Key Facts

- Google Business Profile: https://maps.app.goo.gl/yz2gipKBB3Dfp7Tg9
- Address: 41-02 Bell Blvd, Bayside, NY 11361
- Phone: (718) 225-6677
- Hours: Tuesday–Thursday 10am–7pm, Saturday–Sunday 9am–3pm
- Accepts: Delta Dental, MetLife, Aetna, Guardian, Cigna, and most major PPO plans
- Financing: CareCredit and Sunbit available
- Parking: Free on-site parking
- Invisalign status: Gold Plus Provider
- Technology: 3D cone beam CT, iTero Element digital scanner, Philips Zoom! whitening
